summary: The diff shows only two files modified: backend/main.mo (truncated, showing existing data types but no new chat-related types or functions visible) and project_state.json (updated to record pending feature requests). No frontend files were changed, and the Motoko backend additions for chat are not confirmed in the truncated diff. Virtually all requirements appear unimplemented based on available evidence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace localStorage-based chat with Motoko backend chat system storing messages in stable state with sendMessage, getMessages, markMessagesRead functions.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated and shows no ChatMessage type, no stable chat storage, and no sendMessage/getMessages/markMessagesRead functions. No frontend files (ParentDashboard.tsx, StudentMessagesPage.tsx) were modified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement React Query polling loop (1-second interval) in ParentDashboard.tsx and StudentMessagesPage.tsx.
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend files were modified in the diff. ParentDashboard.tsx and StudentMessagesPage.tsx are not listed as changed files.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add online/offline presence tracking with updatePresence and getPresence in Motoko and frontend polling every 30 seconds with green/grey dot display.
missing_requirements.reason: No presence-related types or functions are visible in the truncated backend/main.mo, and no frontend files were modified.
